title: Find My Device - Don't Allow - Enable now - Allow Once [Only This Time - Android] [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Find My Device location permission prompt reappears after granting "Ask Next Time or When I Share" permission on Android
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android device.
2. Connect a supported Poly Bluetooth headset to the Android device.
3. From the Home screen, tap the main menu (hamburger icon) in the top-left corner.
4. Tap 'Find My Device' from the main menu.
5. When the location permission prompt appears, tap 'Don't Allow'.
6. On the Find My Device screen, tap 'Enable Now'.
7. When the system location permission dialog appears, select 'Ask Next Time or When I Share' (Android).
8. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
9. Observe the location permission prompt that reappears.
expected: After returning to the app, the location permission prompt should not reappear if the user has already made a selection. The Find My Device screen should be displayed without further permission prompts.
